channel.title: The Luck Journal
channel.description: Guides, strategy and straight talk on crypto and the world's lotteries.

item.title: What is luck?
item.description: My whole philosophy in one word. Luck isn’t fortune or fate — it’s preparation meeting opportunity. From the lotteries on this site to finding Bitcoin in 2009, here’s what that really means — and why “they just got lucky” misses the point entirely.
